title: Ecclesiastes 1: Vanity of Vanities
description: The preacher's devastating meditation on the meaninglessness of human striving under the sun.
introduction: The preacher's devastating meditation on the meaninglessness of human striving under the sun.

translation.original_text: Ματαιότης ματαιοτήτων, εἶπεν ὁ Ἐκκλησιαστής, ματαιότης ματαιοτήτων, τὰ πάντα ματαιότης. Τίς περισσεία τῷ ἀνθρώπῳ ἐν παντὶ μόχθῳ αὐτοῦ ᾧ μοχθεῖ ὑπὸ τὸν ἥλιον;
translation.text: Vanity of vanities, said the Preacher, vanity of vanities, all is vanity. What profit has a man from all his toil at which he toils under the sun?
There is nothing new under the sun.
